sum: One of the most unique melee warrior classes Morituri are fighters who have abandoned the need to use armor or any magic item in order to enhance their capabilities.
no: One of the most unique melee warrior classes Morituri are fighters who have abandoned the need to use armor or any magic item in order to enhance their capabilities.

co.n: Install the Morituri as a warrior
Install the Morituri as a paladin
